mapper.select: SELECT c.*, g.group_name FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group_contact c LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group g ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group_contact (id, group_id, contact_name, contact_phone, position_name, department_name, status, source_type, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{positionName}, #{departmentName}, #{status}, #{sourceType}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE, #{updatedBy}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group_contact SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, position_name = #{positionName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group_contact SET deleted_flag = 1, updated_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.change_type AS "changeType", s.before_contact_name AS "beforeContactName", s.after_contact_name AS "afterContactName", s.before_contact_phone AS "beforeContactPhone", s.after_contact_phone AS "afterContactPhone", s.before_department_name AS "beforeDepartmentName", s.after_department_name AS "afterDepartmentName", s.before_position_name AS "beforePositionName", s.after_position_name AS "afterPositionName", s.created_time AS "changeTime" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_wf_ticket_contact_snapshot s WHERE s.contact_id = #{contactId} ORDER BY s.created_time DESC
